languages.text: "Бесчисленное множество. Есть те, что заключают в себе артефакты из самых отдаленных регионов Галактики. Другие служат трансцендентными узилищами для существ невообразимой мощи, некогда испивавших звезды досуха. Доступ к ним закрыт для тебя, как и для прочих экземпляров низших рас".

"Countless more. Some contain artefacts from the farthest reaches of the galaxy. Others serve as transcendent dungeons for beings of unfathomable power who once drank the stars dry. Access to them is denied to you, as it is to other specimens of inferior races."
languages.original_text: "Бесчисленное множество. Есть те, что заключают в себе артефакты из самых отдаленных регионов Галактики. Другие служат трансцендентными узилищами для существ невообразимой мощи, некогда испивавших звезды досуха. Доступ к ним закрыт для тебя, как и для прочих экземпляров низших рас".

traits.locale_text: "Countless more. Some contain artefacts from the farthest regions of the galaxy. Others serve as transcendent dungeons for beings of unfathomable power who once drank the stars dry. Access to them is denied to you, as it is to other specimens of inferior races."

"Countless more. Some contain artefacts from the farthest reaches of the galaxy. Others serve as transcendent dungeons for beings of unfathomable power who once drank the stars dry. Access to them is denied to you, as it is to other specimens of inferior races."

"Countless more. Some contain artefacts from the farthest reaches of the galaxy. Others serve as transcendent dungeons for beings of unfathomable power who once drank the stars dry. Access to them is denied to you, as it is to other specimens of inferior races."

"Countless more. Some contain artefacts from the farthest regions of the galaxy. Others serve as transcendent dungeons for beings of unfathomable power who once drank the stars dry. Access to them is denied to you, as it is to other specimens of inferior races."

languages.text: “还有无数个。有些存放着来自银河最遥远角落的造物。另一些则是通天地牢，关押着曾将星辰饮尽，拥有莫测之力的存在。不过你和其他劣等种族一样，无权进入。”
languages.original_text: "Countless more. Some contain artefacts from the farthest reaches of the galaxy. Others serve as transcendent dungeons for beings of unfathomable power who once drank the stars dry. Access to them is denied to you, as it is to other specimens of inferior races."

traits.locale_text: “还有无数个。有些存放着来自银河最遥远角落的造物。另一些则是通天地牢，关押着曾将星辰饮尽，拥有莫测之力的存在。不过你和其他劣等种族一样，无权进入。”

languages.text: «Hay un número incontable de ellas. Algunas albergan artefactos de los confines más lejanos de la galaxia. Otros son mazmorras trascendentales para seres de poder inefable que en su día se bebieron las estrellas. El acceso a ellas te está vedado, como a cualquier otro espécimen de una raza inferior».
languages.original_text: "Countless more. Some contain artefacts from the farthest reaches of the galaxy. Others serve as transcendent dungeons for beings of unfathomable power who once drank the stars dry. Access to them is denied to you, as it is to other specimens of inferior races."

traits.locale_text: «Hay un número incontable de ellas. Algunas albergan artefactos de los confines más lejanos de la galaxia. Otros son mazmorras trascendentales para seres de poder inefable que en su día se bebieron las estrellas. El acceso a ellas te está vedado, como a cualquier otro espécimen de una raza inferior».

languages.text: « Elles sont innombrables. Certaines contiennent des artefacts provenant des confins de la galaxie. D'autres servent de donjons transcendants à des êtres d'un pouvoir insondable qui ont autrefois anéanti jusqu'aux étoiles. L'accès vous en est interdit, comme il l'est à tous les représentants des races inférieures. »
languages.original_text: "Countless more. Some contain artefacts from the farthest reaches of the galaxy. Others serve as transcendent dungeons for beings of unfathomable power who once drank the stars dry. Access to them is denied to you, as it is to other specimens of inferior races."

traits.locale_text: « Elles sont innombrables. Certaines contiennent des artefacts provenant des confins de la galaxie. D'autres servent de donjons transcendants à des êtres d'un pouvoir insondable qui ont autrefois anéanti jusqu'aux étoiles. L'accès vous en est interdit, comme il l'est à tous les représentants des races inférieures. »

languages.text: "Sayısız salon daha var. Bazıları galaksinin en uzak köşelerinden eserler barındırıyor. Diğerleri; bir zamanlar yıldızları kurutana dek içen, akıl almaz güce sahip varlıklar için aşkın zindanlar olarak hizmet ediyor. Alt ırkların diğer örneklerine olduğu gibi sana da onlara erişim izni verilmedi."
languages.original_text: "Countless more. Some contain artefacts from the farthest reaches of the galaxy. Others serve as transcendent dungeons for beings of unfathomable power who once drank the stars dry. Access to them is denied to you, as it is to other specimens of inferior races."

traits.locale_text: "Sayısız salon daha var. Bazıları galaksinin en uzak köşelerinden eserler barındırıyor. Diğerleri; bir zamanlar yıldızları kurutana dek içen, akıl almaz güce sahip varlıklar için aşkın zindanlar olarak hizmet ediyor. Alt ırkların diğer örneklerine olduğu gibi sana da onlara erişim izni verilmedi."

languages.text: "Zahllose weitere. Einige enthalten Artefakte aus den fernsten Winkeln der Galaxie. Andere dienen als transzendente Kerker für Wesen von unvorstellbarer Macht, die einst die Sterne trocken tranken. Der Zugang zu ihnen ist Euch und anderen Vertretern niederer Rassen verwehrt."
languages.original_text: "Countless more. Some contain artefacts from the farthest reaches of the galaxy. Others serve as transcendent dungeons for beings of unfathomable power who once drank the stars dry. Access to them is denied to you, as it is to other specimens of inferior races."

traits.locale_text: "Zahllose weitere. Einige enthalten Artefakte aus den fernsten Winkeln der Galaxie. Andere dienen als transzendente Kerker für Wesen von unvorstellbarer Macht, die einst die Sterne trocken tranken. Der Zugang zu ihnen ist Euch und anderen Vertretern niederer Rassen verwehrt."

languages.text: 「無数のものがあります。銀河の最も遠い領域から持ち込まれた遺物が入っているものもあれば、かつて星を飲み干した深遠な力の存在のための超越的なダンジョンとして機能しているものもあります。あなたのような劣等種は、それらへのアクセスは拒否されています。」
languages.original_text: "Countless more. Some contain artefacts from the farthest reaches of the galaxy. Others serve as transcendent dungeons for beings of unfathomable power who once drank the stars dry. Access to them is denied to you, as it is to other specimens of inferior races."

traits.locale_text: 「無数のものがあります。銀河の最も遠い領域から持ち込まれた遺物が入っているものもあれば、かつて星を飲み干した深遠な力の存在のための超越的なダンジョンとして機能しているものもあります。あなたのような劣等種は、それらへのアクセスは拒否されています。」
